short_term.headline: US-Iran military clashes escalate in the Middle East
short_term.impact: Spiking crude prices will hurt oil refiners but benefit domestic explorers.

short_term.headline: India routes energy imports through UAE to avoid Hormuz risks
short_term.impact: Boosts port operators handling alternative routes; increases shipping insurance costs.

short_term.headline: RBI schedules Variable Rate Repo auction to ease liquidity
short_term.impact: Eases short-term banking system liquidity, supporting banking stocks marginally.

short_term.headline: July rains reduce monsoon deficit but crop risks remain
short_term.impact: Boosts immediate sentiment for fertilizer and agrochemical manufacturers.

short_term.headline: US tightens visa rules for Indian students and professionals
short_term.impact: Negative sentiment for IT companies relying on cross-border talent mobility.

long_term.headline: Cabinet approves massive ₹1.27 trillion Semiconductor Mission 2.0
long_term.impact: Long-term structural boost for domestic electronics manufacturers and chip designers.

long_term.headline: NTPC joint venture floats ₹28,000 crore nuclear plant tender
long_term.impact: Expands nuclear energy footprint, benefiting power generation and heavy engineering.

long_term.headline: Government plans next phase of food processing PLI scheme
long_term.impact: Enhances margins and capacity expansion for major packaged food players.

long_term.headline: Government plans linking land records with Unified Lending Interface
long_term.impact: Lowers credit risk and speeds up loan disbursals for rural lenders.

long_term.headline: Gujarat leads NITI Aayog Investment Friendliness Index 2026
long_term.impact: Attracts long-term industrial capex, benefiting state-based infrastructure and utility firms.
